vault_sync.commit_message: vault: 2026-07-22 12:00 SAST sync — morning standup consolidated

summary: Wednesday Jul 22 12:00 SAST — Morning standup consolidated. 9 blockers documented. Shopify and Meta tokens remain CRITICAL. RocketChat deploy queued. Daytona agent fleet active planning. CIIE booth deadline Aug 31.
